Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.data

Class SeriesType

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.data.SeriesType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<SeriesType>
public class SeriesType extends Object implements Comparable<SeriesType>
A type for bands and other series types, e.g. fainter-thans, means.

  • Method Details

    • initClass

      public static void initClass()

    • getSeriesColorChangeNotifier

      public static Notifier<Map<SeriesType,Color>> getSeriesColorChangeNotifier()
      Returns:
      The series color change notifier.

    • getSeriesSizeChangeNotifier

      public static Notifier<Map<SeriesType,Integer>> getSeriesSizeChangeNotifier()
      Returns:
      The series size change notifier.

    • create

      public static SeriesType create(String description, String shortName, Color color, boolean synthetic, boolean userDefined)
      Create a new series type or return an existing one.
      Parameters:
      description - The series type's description.
      shortName - The series type's short name (AID.bands).
      color - The series type's color.
      synthetic - Is this series synthetic (i.e. not associated with data but derived from data)?
      userDefined - Is this series user-defined?
      Returns:
      the new or pre-existing SeriesType instance.

    • delete

      public static void delete(SeriesType type)
      Delete the specified series type.
      Parameters:
      type - The series type to delete.

    • getIndex

      public int getIndex()
      Returns:
      the index

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      Returns:
      the description

    • getShortName

      public String getShortName()
      Returns:
      the shortName

    • getColor

      public Color getColor()
      Returns:
      the default color

    • getSize

      public int getSize()
      Returns:
      the default size

    • isSynthetic

      public boolean isSynthetic()
      Returns:
      the synthetic

    • isUserDefined

      public boolean isUserDefined()
      Returns:
      the userDefined

    • getSeriesFromIndex

      public static SeriesType getSeriesFromIndex(int index)
      Map from AID band index to series type.
      Parameters:
      index - The integer band index
      Returns:
      The band, Unspecified if not found.

    • getSeriesFromShortName

      public static SeriesType getSeriesFromShortName(String shortName)
      Map from short band description to series type.
      Parameters:
      shortName - The short description of the band.
      Returns:
      The band, Unspecified if not found.

    • getSeriesFromDescription

      public static SeriesType getSeriesFromDescription(String description)
      Map from band descriptive name to series type.
      Parameters:
      description - The descriptive description of the band.
      Returns:
      The band, Unspecified if not found.

    • exists

      public static boolean exists(String description)
      Does the series, specified by description, exist?
      Parameters:
      description - The description, as passed to create().
      Returns:
      Whether or not the series already exists.

    • getColorFromSeries

      public static Color getColorFromSeries(SeriesType series)
      Given a series, retrieve its color.
      Parameters:
      series - The series in question.
      Returns:
      The corresponding color.

    • getSizeFromSeries

      public static int getSizeFromSeries(SeriesType series)
      Given a series, retrieve its size.
      Parameters:
      series - The series in question.
      Returns:
      The corresponding size.

    • updateSeriesColorMap

      public static void updateSeriesColorMap(Map<SeriesType,Color> newSeries2ColorMap)
      Updates the series to color mapping according to the pairs in the supplied map. Note that this may be a subset of all series-color pairs, so it may not completely replace the existing map, just overwrite some pairs. It also updates the series color preference and notifies listeners of the change.
      Parameters:
      newSeries2ColorMap - The map with which to update the series-color map.

    • updateSeriesSizeMap

      public static void updateSeriesSizeMap(Map<SeriesType,Integer> newSeries2SizeMap)
      Updates the series to size mapping according to the pairs in the supplied map. Note that this may be a subset of all series-size pairs, so it may not completely replace the existing map, just overwrite some pairs. It also updates the series size preference and notifies listeners of the change.
      Parameters:
      newSeries2SizeMap - The map with which to update the series-size map.

    • setDefaultSeriesColors

      public static void setDefaultSeriesColors()
      Restore the default series colors and notifies listeners.

    • setDefaultSeriesSizes

      public static void setDefaultSeriesSizes()
      Restore the default series sizes and notifies listeners.

    • getDefault

      public static SeriesType getDefault()
      Returns the default series type. This is like the equivalent of null for this type.
      Returns:
      The default series type.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      We override toString() to return description rather than enum name.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<SeriesType>
